About.title: Who <gold>we are</gold>
About.intro: Sterkte Records was born in 2021 from a passion for authentic music and a commitment to bringing African artists to the whole world. Since our founding in Lubumbashi, we've grown into a leading independent music distributor across Central Africa and the diaspora, with a growing presence in Morocco and Europe.
introParagraphs: Sterkte Records is an independent music label founded in Lubumbashi, Democratic Republic of Congo. Our mission is simple but ambitious: give African artists the tools, resources, and network they need to compete on the world stage, without sacrificing their artistic authenticity.

We believe the musical richness of Congo, Central Africa, and the whole continent deserves to be heard everywhere. That's why we offer distribution to 150+ global digital platforms, personalized support, a professional studio, booking and management services, and much more.
Our multidisciplinary team combines music expertise, digital marketing mastery, and passion for artists. We're not just a middleman — we're career partners committed to your long-term success.
visionParagraphs: Build a solid bridge between the boundless creativity of African artists and a global audience hungry for new sounds. We believe the music of Lubumbashi, of Kinshasa, of the whole continent, has the potential to touch millions of souls around the world.
Our ambition: make Sterkte Records the go-to reference for any African artist looking to build a lasting, ethical, and profitable international career.
missionParagraphs: Support every signed artist with professional tools, a dedicated team, and distribution to 150+ global platforms. We handle the technical, administrative, and strategic side so the artist can focus on what matters most: creating.
Transparency, excellence, and passion are our three pillars. Every decision we make puts the artist's interests first.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: Total honesty about numbers, contracts, and decisions. No grey areas.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: International-quality production, regardless of budget or the artist's level.

openness.title: Openness
openness.description: Every genre, every African culture. Our roster reflects the continent's diversity.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Always ahead of new music technology, emerging platforms, and global trends.

2021.title: Sterkte Records is born
2021.description: The label is founded in Lubumbashi by Axel l'or Kaumba. First artists signed for distribution: Mr. Freez, Feyme, and the start of outside collaborations. A musical adventure begins, driven by a clear vision: propel Congolese music onto world stages.

2022.title: First steps and numbers
2022.description: Official launch on Spotify, Apple Music, Deezer, and the major platforms. The first releases quickly pass 50,000 streams. The label lays solid foundations and starts building credibility in the African independent music ecosystem.

2023.title: Roster expansion
2023.description: KBG Gad joins for gospel, talented beatmakers come on board, and the creative team grows. The catalogue gains new sounds and genres. The network extends to Kinshasa, Brazzaville, and Abidjan.

2024.title: Aiming for half a million streams
2024.description: An ambitious goal: reach 500K cumulative streams. Launch of the mobile studio in Lubumbashi, then in Agadir, Morocco, and other cities. This innovation lets us record artists wherever they are, with no geographic constraint.

2025.title: Going international
2025.description: Established presence in 20+ countries. Partnerships with foreign labels including Lghorfa Music and Arteast Music in Morocco, as well as other structures in Europe and Africa. Sterkte Records establishes itself as a bridge between Africa and the world, with an ever-growing digital footprint.

Pricing.title: One simple price, built for your career
Pricing.description: One subscription, 100% of your royalties. No revenue share, no hidden tiers — just the price that gets you distributed everywhere.
Pricing.africaEligibilityNote: Africa rate reserved for eligible countries (DR Congo, Cameroon, Ivory Coast, Senegal and other African markets) — determined automatically at signup based on your country.

solo.name: Solo
solo.description: The reference plan to distribute your music worldwide.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For the artist who releases regularly — same perks, one level up.

label.name: Label
label.description: For signed artists and small labels — several artists, one account.

features.unlimitedReleases: Unlimited releases, all formats (Single, EP, Album)
features.allDsps: 150+ platforms including Spotify, Apple Music, Deezer, Boomplay
features.multiArtist: Up to 5 artists on a single account

Pricing.royaltiesNote: 100% of the royalties generated by your streams come back to you. Sterkte Records takes no commission on your DSP revenue — our business model relies on subscriptions, add-ons, and our services (studio, booking, consulting).

change.question: Can I change my plan at any time?
change.answer: Yes, you can switch plans or between monthly and annual billing at any time from your artist space. The change takes effect at the next billing cycle.

africaEligibility.question: How do I know if I'm eligible for the Africa rate?
africaEligibility.answer: Eligibility is determined automatically at signup based on your country of residence (DRC, Cameroon, Ivory Coast, Senegal, and other African markets).

labelPlan.question: What does the Label plan add over Solo/Pro?
labelPlan.answer: The Label plan lets you manage up to 5 artist profiles from a single account — handy for a label or manager distributing several artists. Everything else (100% royalties, all platforms) stays the same.

cancel.question: Can I cancel my subscription whenever I want?
cancel.answer: Yes, no commitment and no hidden fees. Your catalogue and streaming history stay yours if you leave.

Faq.title: Frequently asked questions
Faq.description: Everything you need to know before distributing your music with Sterkte Records.

q1.question: Which audio file formats are accepted?
q1.answer: WAV and FLAC are recommended for maximum quality; MP3 is also accepted. A master of at least 16-bit / 44.1 kHz is required.

q2.question: How long does it take for my music to go live?
q2.answer: We submit your release to platforms within 5 to 7 business days after full validation. Release delays then vary by platform (3 to 14 business days). We recommend submitting at least 3 weeks before your desired release date.

q3.question: Do I keep the rights to my music?
q3.answer: Yes, 100%. Sterkte Records acts as a distribution agent: you remain the sole owner of your masters and copyrights.

q4.question: When do I get paid, and from what amount?
q4.answer: Royalties are paid out quarterly, within 30 days after the end of each quarter, from a minimum threshold of $25 (or equivalent).

q5.question: Which platforms will my music be available on?
q5.answer: Spotify, Apple Music, Deezer, YouTube Music, TikTok, Boomplay, Audiomack, Amazon Music, Tidal and many more — over 150 platforms in total.

q6.question: Can I take down my music at any time?
q6.answer: Yes, from your artist space or by email. The takedown is completed within 7 to 30 business days depending on the platforms involved.

q7.question: Do you support Mobile Money payments?
q7.answer: Yes, in addition to international credit cards, we support Mobile Money (Airtel Money, M-Pesa, Orange Money, MTN) for artists in Africa.

q8.question: How can I contact you with a question?
q8.answer: By email at contact.sterkterecords@gmail.com or via our contact form — we reply within 48 business hours.

Collaborators.title: Collaborators
Collaborators.subtitle: Manage who can view {artist}'s dashboard.
Collaborators.notOwner: You collaborate on {artist} — only the artist's owner can manage collaborators.
Collaborators.error: Couldn't send the invitation — try again.
Collaborators.errorAlreadyAccepted: This person already accepted — inviting them again would cut off their access. Revoke them first if you really want to start over.
Collaborators.listSubtitle: Status of invitations sent for this artist.

accept.title: Invitation — {artist}
accept.descriptionView: You'll be able to view this artist's dashboard, catalog, and stats.
accept.descriptionManage: You'll be able to view this artist's dashboard, catalog, and stats.
accept.error: Couldn't accept this invitation — try again or ask for a new link.
accept.invalidDescription: This link is no longer valid — it may have already been used or revoked. Ask the person who sent it for a new invitation.

format.explanation: Platforms only accept WAV, FLAC, or MP3.
format.suggestion: Export your track in one of these formats and try again.

codec.message: This WAV file appears to be compressed, not uncompressed PCM.
codec.explanation: Platforms expect a standard PCM WAV file, without compression.
codec.suggestion: Re-export your file as "WAV PCM" (sometimes called "standard WAV") from your audio software.

sampleRate.explanation: 44,100 Hz (CD quality) is the minimum recommended by platforms.
sampleRate.suggestion: Re-export your track at 44,100 Hz or higher if your software allows it.

bitDepth.explanation: 16 bits is the minimum recommended for good audio quality.
bitDepth.suggestion: Re-export your track at 16 bits or higher (24 bits recommended for a master).

tooShort.explanation: A duration under one second usually means an incomplete or corrupted file.
tooShort.suggestion: Check that the right file was selected and try again.

abnormalPeaks.explanation: An isolated peak much louder than the rest of the signal can be a click, a crackle, or a recording issue.
abnormalPeaks.suggestion: Listen back to your track at the affected moments to check for anything to fix.

tooQuiet.message: This track seems very quiet ({value} dBFS on average).
tooQuiet.explanation: A track that's too quiet can sound weaker than other tracks during playback.
tooQuiet.suggestion: Increase the overall level during mastering before re-uploading your track.

tooLoud.message: This track seems very loud ({value} dBFS on average).
tooLoud.explanation: A very high level leaves little headroom and increases the risk of distortion.
tooLoud.suggestion: Check your mastering: a bit more headroom avoids unpleasant surprises.

duplicateInBatch.message: This file has already been added to this release.
duplicateInBatch.explanation: Two identical tracks were detected in the same upload.
duplicateInBatch.suggestion: Remove one of the two duplicate files.

duplicateInCatalog.message: This file looks like a track already in your catalog.
duplicateInCatalog.explanation: The same audio file already exists on another one of your releases.
duplicateInCatalog.suggestion: Check that this isn't an accidental duplicate upload.

integrity.message: This file couldn't be read correctly.
integrity.explanation: The file appears to be corrupted or in a format not supported by the browser.
integrity.suggestion: Re-export your track from your audio software and try again.

durationConsistency.message: The duration declared in the file doesn't match the actual detected duration.
durationConsistency.explanation: This mismatch can indicate a truncated file or an incorrect header.
durationConsistency.suggestion: Re-export your track from your audio software and try again.

integrity.message: This image couldn't be read correctly.
integrity.explanation: The file appears to be corrupted or in an unsupported format.
integrity.suggestion: Re-export your cover art and try again.

format.explanation: Platforms accept JPEG or PNG files.
format.suggestion: Export your cover art as JPEG or PNG and try again.

dimensions.explanation: Platforms require a square cover of at least 3000×3000 pixels.
dimensions.suggestion: Use a larger image or resize your cover to at least 3000×3000 px.

ratio.explanation: The cover must have an exactly square ratio (width = height).
ratio.suggestion: Crop your image into a perfect square.

fileSize.message: This file is quite large ({megabytes} MB).
fileSize.explanation: A very heavy file can slow down upload and processing at the distributor.
fileSize.suggestion: Slightly compress your image with no visible quality loss before uploading.

colorProfile.message: This image appears to be in CMYK rather than RGB.
colorProfile.explanation: Platforms require an sRGB (RGB) color profile, not CMYK (used for printing).
colorProfile.suggestion: Convert your image to RGB/sRGB in your editing software before exporting.

overCompressed.message: This image appears to be heavily compressed.
overCompressed.explanation: Too much compression can create visible artifacts (blocks, blur) on the cover.
overCompressed.suggestion: Re-export your image at a higher JPEG quality (or as PNG).

blur.message: This image seems to lack sharpness.
blur.explanation: A blurry cover is less engaging and can look unprofessional.
blur.suggestion: Check the sharpness of your original artwork before exporting again.

empty.message: This image appears to be empty or flat.
empty.explanation: The image seems to contain almost no visual detail (solid color).
empty.suggestion: Check that the right file was selected.

margins.message: This image appears to have white or transparent margins.
margins.explanation: Platforms expect artwork that fills the entire square frame, without a border.
margins.suggestion: Crop your artwork so it fills the whole image area.

releaseTitle.suggestion: Enter a title for your release.

genre.suggestion: Choose a genre for your release.

language.suggestion: Enter the main language of your release.

trackTitle.message: The title of track {position} is required.
trackTitle.suggestion: Enter a title for this track.

mainArtistConsistency.message: No main artist is set for track {position}.
mainArtistConsistency.explanation: Each track must have at least one contributor with the "Main artist" role.
mainArtistConsistency.suggestion: Add a contributor with the "Main artist" role for this track.

featuringConsistency.message: The title of track {position} mentions a featuring that isn't declared.
featuringConsistency.explanation: The title contains "feat." or "ft." but no "Featuring" contributor has been added.
featuringConsistency.suggestion: Add the featured artist to this track's contributors.

explicitConsistency.message: At least one track is marked "explicit content" but the release isn't.
explicitConsistency.explanation: If a track contains explicit language, the whole release must also be marked as such.
explicitConsistency.suggestion: Check "Explicit content" at the release level.

dateConsistency.message: The recording date is after the release date.
dateConsistency.explanation: A recording can't have happened after the track was released.
dateConsistency.suggestion: Check and correct one of the two dates.

isrcFormat.message: The ISRC "{value}" for track {position} isn't in the right format.
isrcFormat.explanation: A valid ISRC has 12 characters: 2 country letters, 3 characters, then 7 digits (e.g. FRXXX2400001).
isrcFormat.suggestion: Fix the ISRC, or leave the field empty so one is generated automatically.

upcFormat.explanation: A valid UPC has 12 digits with a correct check digit.
upcFormat.suggestion: Fix the UPC code, or leave the field empty so one is generated automatically.

splitsSum.message: The rights split for track {position} totals {sum}% instead of 100%.
splitsSum.explanation: The sum of all contributors' percentages must be exactly 100%.
splitsSum.suggestion: Adjust the percentages so they total 100%.

duplicateIsrc.message: The ISRC for track {position} is already used in your catalog.
duplicateIsrc.explanation: Each track must have a unique ISRC.
duplicateIsrc.suggestion: Leave the ISRC field empty so a new code is generated automatically.

duplicateUpc.message: This UPC code is already used by another one of your releases.
duplicateUpc.explanation: Each release must have a unique UPC.
duplicateUpc.suggestion: Leave the UPC field empty so a new code is generated automatically.

duplicateTitle.message: A release with this title already exists in your catalog.
duplicateTitle.explanation: Two releases with the same title can be confusing for your listeners.
duplicateTitle.suggestion: Check this isn't an accidental duplicate, or make the title more specific (e.g. "Title (Remix)").

typeStep.title: What do you want to distribute?
typeStep.subtitle: The release type determines the expected number of tracks.
typeStep.errorReadOnly: You only have read access to this artist (collaborator) — only the owner can create a new release.

audioStep.title: Add your audio files
audioStep.subtitle: Accepted formats: WAV (recommended), FLAC, MP3.

audioStep.trackCountHint: {count} track(s) added — between {min} and {max} expected for this release type.
audioStep.minTracksWarning: Add at least {min} track(s) to continue.

metadataStep.title: Metadata
metadataStep.subtitle: Information about the release and each track.

contributorsStep.title: Contributors & splits
contributorsStep.subtitle: Add each track's contributors and their share of royalties.

artworkStep.title: Cover art
artworkStep.subtitle: Square format, minimum 3000×3000 px, no promotional text.
artworkStep.dropzoneLabel: Drag and drop your cover here, or click to browse
artworkStep.dropzoneHint: JPEG or PNG, square, minimum 3000×3000 px
artworkStep.appleAddonDescription: Additional format optimized for display on Apple Music — billed as an add-on at submission.
artworkStep.selfDeclarationTitle: I confirm my cover art follows these rules

selfDeclaration.noText: No promotional text or slogan overlaid on the image
selfDeclaration.noLogo: No platform logos (Spotify, Apple Music…) on the image
selfDeclaration.noUrl: No URL or social media handle visible
selfDeclaration.noQrCode: No QR code on the image

platformsStep.title: Distribution platforms
platformsStep.subtitle: Choose the platforms your release should be delivered to.

scheduleStep.title: Release schedule
scheduleStep.subtitle: Choose the release date (and time, optional).
scheduleStep.shortLeadWarning: A date {days} days out maximizes your chances of editorial playlisting.

summaryStep.title: Summary
summaryStep.subtitle: Review everything before submitting.
summaryStep.validationOk: Everything looks good — ready to submit.

submitStep.title: Confirmation & submission
submitStep.subtitle: Last step before sending it to our team for review.
submitStep.successDescription: Your release is being reviewed by our team before going live. You'll get a notification at every step.
submitStep.errorIncomplete: Some information is missing — check the previous steps.
submitStep.error: Submission failed. Please try again in a moment.
submitStep.addonPaymentRequired: The Apple Music Artwork option is selected: pay for it before sending your release.
submitStep.addonPaymentButton: Pay for the option and submit
submitStep.addonPaymentError: The payment could not be started. Please try again in a moment.
submitStep.accountNotValidatedDescription: Validate your payment to submit this release to our team — you can keep preparing it in the meantime.

empty.title: No releases yet
empty.description: Distribute your first release to see it here.

detail.requestModificationDialogDescription: Describe what you want to change — our team will review your request before passing it on to our partner platforms.
detail.requestSent: Your request has been sent to our team.
detail.takedownDialogDescription: This removes your release from all platforms. Your stats continuity will be affected and propagation can take a few days. Your ISRC stays reserved and your release is archived, never permanently deleted.
detail.takedownRequested: Your release removal is in progress.

SubscriptionPage.title: Choose your plan
SubscriptionPage.subtitle: One subscription, 100% of your royalties. Change or cancel anytime.
SubscriptionPage.successBanner: Payment confirmed — your subscription is active!
SubscriptionPage.alreadyActive: You already have an active {period} {plan} subscription.
SubscriptionPage.periodUnavailable: This billing period isn't available in your region.
SubscriptionPage.annualOnlyNote: Annual billing only in your region.

solo.name: Solo
solo.description: Distribute your music worldwide, with no revenue share.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For artists releasing regularly — same perks, a step up.

label.name: Label
label.description: For signed artists and small labels — several artists, one account.

features.multiArtist: Up to 5 artists on a single account

manualPayment.title: I've already paid
manualPayment.description: Send your payment by mobile money or PayPal, then upload a screenshot of the confirmation. Our team validates your account manually, usually within 24h.
manualPayment.screenshotRequired: Add a screenshot of the payment first.
manualPayment.submitError: Couldn't submit the proof — try again.

proofStatus.pendingDescription: Your payment proof for the {plan} plan ({period}) is being reviewed by our team. You can keep preparing your releases in the meantime.
proofStatus.rejectedDescription: Reason: {reason}. You can send a new proof below.

errors.unauthenticated: Session expired — please sign in again.
errors.period_unavailable: This billing period isn't available in your region.
errors.invalid_coupon: This promo code is invalid or expired.
errors.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.

layout.footerRights: © Sterkte Records SARL — All rights reserved · Avenue Mama Yemo, Lubumbashi, DRC

confirmEmail.ignoreNote: If you didn't request this, you can safely ignore this email.

signup.preview: Confirm your email to activate your Sterkte Records account
signup.heading: Welcome to Sterkte Records 🎉
signup.body: One last click to activate your artist account and start distributing your music worldwide.

invite.preview: You've been invited to join Sterkte Records
invite.heading: You've been invited to Sterkte Records
invite.body: Click below to accept the invitation and create your account.

magiclink.heading: Sign in to your account
magiclink.body: Click below to sign in to your Sterkte Records account — this link can only be used once.

email_change.heading: Confirm your new email address
email_change.body: You requested to change the email address linked to your account. Click below to confirm this change.

reauthentication.heading: Identity confirmation required
reauthentication.body: To perform this sensitive action, confirm your identity by clicking below.

passwordReset.heading: Reset your password
passwordReset.body: You requested a password reset. Click below to choose a new one — this link expires in 1 hour.
passwordReset.ignoreNote: If you didn't request this, your current password stays unchanged — contact us if in doubt.

securityAlert.preview: Security alert on your Sterkte Records account
securityAlert.heading: Security activity on your account
securityAlert.notYouNote: If this wasn't you, contact us immediately and change your password.

events.mfa_enrolled: Two-factor authentication (2FA) was enabled on your account on {date}.
events.mfa_disabled: Two-factor authentication (2FA) was disabled on your account on {date}.
events.identity_linked: A new account was linked to your profile on {date}.
events.identity_unlinked: A linked account was removed from your profile on {date}.
events.email_changed: Your account's email address was changed on {date}.

subscription.heading: Subscription confirmed ✅
subscription.body: Your Sterkte Records subscription is active. Thank you for your trust!

addon.heading: Payment confirmed
addon.body: Your option has been paid and will be included in your upcoming release.

releaseSubmitted.heading: “{title}” is under review
releaseSubmitted.body: Your release has been received and will be checked by our team before going live on platforms. You'll get a notification as soon as it's being delivered.

delivered.heading: “{title}” was successfully distributed!
delivered.body: Your release is now available on the selected platforms.

error.heading: An issue occurred with “{title}”
error.body: Our partner platforms reported an error while delivering your release. Details below:

releaseCorrectionNeeded.heading: Corrections needed for “{title}”
releaseCorrectionNeeded.body: Before we can distribute your release, please fix the following:

takedownConfirmed.heading: Takedown of “{title}” confirmed
takedownConfirmed.body: Your takedown request has been sent to our partner platforms. Full takedown can take up to 30 business days depending on the platform.

collaboratorInvite.heading: You're invited on {artist}
collaboratorInvite.body: {inviter} invites you to collaborate on the artist {artist} on Sterkte Records. Accept the invitation to access their dashboard.
